1.name: Post-KT Full Model (Tacrolimus / FK506)
1.description: Post-kidney transplant patients; includes FK506 attainment status and 25 variables.

2.name: Post-KT Hematology / ICU Model
2.description: Post-kidney transplant patients; hematological and ICU-focused variables.

3.name: Hepatic / Coagulation Model
3.description: Patients with hepatic involvement; coagulation and liver-function variables.

help_text.肌酐: Post-transplant creatinine; training median 921.95 μmol/L; range 50–2500
help_text.尿酸: Uric acid; training median 363.0 μmol/L; range 50–1200
help_text.白蛋白_溴甲酚绿法_: Albumin BCG; training median 45.3 g/L; range 10–60
help_text.总蛋白: Total protein; training median 74.2 g/L; range 20–120
help_text.未结合胆红素_干_: Indirect bilirubin (dry); training median 2.0 μmol/L; range 0.1–50
help_text.胱抑素c: Cystatin C; training median 2.01 mg/L; range 0.1–15
help_text.单核细胞百分比: ⚠️ Enter as decimal (e.g. 0.08 for 8%); training median 0.081; range 0.00–0.50
help_text.钙: Serum calcium; training median 2.28 mmol/L; range 0.5–4.0
help_text.中性粒细胞百分比: ⚠️ Enter as decimal (e.g. 0.78 for 78%); training median 0.8075; range 0.0–1.0
help_text.总胆红素: Total bilirubin; training median 17.75 μmol/L; range 1–1000
help_text.钾离子: Serum potassium; training median 3.9 mmol/L; range 1.5–9.0
help_text.补_间接胆红素: Supplemental indirect bilirubin; training median 6.7 μmol/L; range 0.1–500
help_text.FK506: Tacrolimus trough level attainment during hospitalization (target 8–12 ng/mL or per protocol)

FK506.全程窗内: Consistently on Target (all troughs within range)
FK506.曾超窗: Intermittently on Target (some troughs out of range)
FK506.全程超窗: Never on Target (all troughs out of range)

_low_confidence_items.issue: Unit ambiguity. JSON mean≈0.083 suggests decimal proportion. If lab reports as %, divide by 100 before entering.
Unit ambiguity. JSON mean≈0.779 suggests decimal proportion.
Very wide SD (716) vs mean (249) and median (36). Likely includes acute liver failure outliers.
_low_confidence_items.action: Review clinical input range for your population.

_low_confidence_items.issue: Could be Thrombin Ratio, PT Ratio, or TT Ratio. Label set to 'Thrombin Ratio'.
Prefix '补_' suggests supplemental or repeat assay. English set to 'Indirect Bilirubin (supplemental)'.
_low_confidence_items.action: Confirm whether this is a repeat assay or different methodology.

_low_confidence_items.issue: Prefix '补_' suggests supplemental prealbumin. Note: prealbumin ≠ albumin.
_low_confidence_items.action: Confirm this is prealbumin (PAB/transthyretin), not albumin.

_low_confidence_items.issue: cat_impute='1' (Used). Leaving blank assumes vasopressors WERE used — unlike all other drugs.
_low_confidence_items.action: Confirm this default imputation is appropriate for your population.

_low_confidence_items.issue: Coefficient = -0.0067, nearly zero. May reflect confounding in training data.
_low_confidence_items.action: Consider whether this variable meaningfully contributes to the model.
